title: Doom Eternal
description: This resource pack adds items from one of my favorite games Doom Eternal
body:
![Надпись DOOM Eternal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0479ed9794677ab6e57eb5ae2e84cfc328ee2cce.gif)

_This resource pack works with the Cit-resewn mod and Optifine_

**Names to rename:**

The Crucible | Горнило (_Diamonds and Nether sword_)

![The Crucible](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C5LMDRzU/images/a53072e51f6d153a7e951bdba169ca244570adfb.png)

Marauders Axe | Марадерский топор (_Diamonds and Nether Axe_)

![Marauders Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C5LMDRzU/images/334b89c87e0bd8489d5a2930b5113cc49fef76c4.png)

Sentinel Hammer | Молот Стражей (_Diamonds and Nether Axe_)

![Sentinel Hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C5LMDRzU/images/003c415f2a725fa9023366d463cf2ce4c47b753e.png)

Super Shotgun | Супер Дробовик (_Crossbow_)

![Super Shotgun ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C5LMDRzU/images/1d1ba68e7701f1105adfda54d6c46bd28cd259c5.png)

Slayer Blade | Лезвие Палача (_Diamonds and Nether sword_)

![Slayer Blade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C5LMDRzU/images/6da0b84d20d048d9b8d6364ed2e16e3c90611454.png)
